item.name: pictures

request.description: list user's uploaded pictures

Allows to add picture/series of pictures for user. 
urls proccessing is done on FE size and by convention these urls refer to /user/pictures
also FE should upload pictures with correct extension and unique name - preferably in form of UUID.ext
backend automatically creates UUID_200x200.ext, UUID_400x400.ext and UUID_680x680.ext when upload is finished
FE can subsribe to images/user/pictures/UUID/{res}/generated to determine when processing has been finished, where res is 200, 400 or 680

for smooth operations it is reccommended to first upload pictures and only then to post update

Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

request.description: same as /profile/userKey/followers but for logged in user

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

request.description:
allows to edit profile details

some fields details:
- coordinates - current user location
- displayName - selfExplanatory
- providerImageUrl - if user have created profile authorizing through social media - this url should be set to the user pic in said media, if both this and imageName are present imageName should be shown
- unit - MILES vs KM - not verified by backend - so values are whatever FE client sets here. Convention need to be double checked between Android and IOS
- imageName - path relative to the userPictures folder in default firebases's storage. Some details on conventions regarding images will be posted below
- language - BE tries to guess best fit. Full language names and locales like pt_BR or en_US are supported. Otherwise details need to be communicated between IOS and Android
- accountPrivate - if true quite a lot of endpoints with information about user won't be working for users who are not followers

Detauils on images:

FE should upload pictures with correct extension and unique name - preferably in form of UUID.ext backend automatically creates UUID_200x200.ext, UUID_400x400.ext and UUID_680x680.ext when upload is finished FE can subsribe to images/userPictures/UUID/{res}/generated to determine when processing has been finished, where res is 200, 400 or 680

for smooth operations it is reccommended to first upload pictures and only then to post update

item.description: seeing/editing/reacting to particular post with the given postKey

request.description:
create a post

- coordinates - current user coordinates at times of creating a post
- type - one of TEXT, IMAGE, AUDIO, CHECK_IN, EVENT, VIDEO
  conventions:
  * images for image posts are located in posts/images
  * videos are in posts/videos
  * audios are in posts/audios
  * for events acompanying media can be image only and are located in events/images
  * checkin as type must be specified only if there are no content to be posted. all other cases check in should be indicated by flag checkin: true
- checkin - flag to indicate that in addition to posting anything user is also doing a checkin in place. placeKey and groupKey must be present
- richLinkData - is not being processed at all at the moment
- mediaUrls - collection of media names uploaded upfront in accordance to postType. see details about media processing in PUT /profile/me docs
- plannedTime - if type of post is EVENT this must be present, otherwise it's stored as is
- plannedEndTime - if type is EVENT and this field is present it should be after plannedTime
- address - either this or placeKey must be present for EVENTS

request.description:
specifically to show posts of type EVENT for the place.

if pastEvents has a default value of false endpoint will return future events only ordered by plannedTime so earliest event is shown first

for pastEvents = true only past event will be shown and order will be reversed - so most recent events are shown. Event is considered past event as fast as it starts

item.description: all related to individual place identifyed by placeKey

request.description:
finds places
if coordinates are specified - orders the result by distance to the specified point, otherwise sort order is not guaranteed

name search is partial and case insensitive

if there are no result google places api will be called and the result will be saved to reduce amount of google place api calls

request.description:
creates place

to create a place group is mandatory, it also generates a first checking for the place, by user created the place

it is only allowed to create places nearby to user's location 

type is one of SHOPPING, PARK, BAR, RESTAURANT, SCHOOL, LOCATION, TWO_BUILDINGS, SPORTS_CENTER, CASTLE, HOUSE_2, MUSIC, FAST_FOOD, HOUSE, BUILDING, BEACH

imageName is processed similar as other media and is stored in placePictures. more details are in PUT /profiles/me documentation

all fields besides coordinates, userCoordinates, name and groupCreatedKey are optional

all of the places related stuff
- creating

request.description:
get group details with some stats

if user is logged in and his location is known - also show group's rating in a surrounding

user's position becomes known by specifically setting it through the PUT /profile/me call or by using Orbis-Coordinates header with ; separated longitude and latitude

it is safe to add the header on any request
updates some details of a group - can be done by any admin

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

request.description: mark group as removed and also mark all of its posts as removed

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

request.description: create share link for a group in case if it is not already present in group details from GET /groups/groupKey or other places where group details are available

events organized by the group.

Same way as with GET /places/placeKey/events they are sorted by plannedTime with nearest to the present events are on top of the list.

pastEvents = true/false changes if we are looking forward or back in future

can be used to remove group's claim over a place. e.g. if someone checked in in a strip club as a kindergarden group or something alike. 

As a result all checkins and posts bearing groups' name will be removed from given place and place will be disowned. 

If there are some competing groups - topmost of them will take over. otherwise place will be just left without an owner and as a result will disappear

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.description:
management of a single group identified by groupKey

things in members, followers, admins and banned folders are pretty much similar with small discrepncies

user can become a member or follower voluntarily, and user can be removed from members or followers by his own action or by respective admin, though admin can not add members or followers

user can become admin or banned by any other admin, user can also stop being banned or admin by any other admin

when person becomes admin he automatically becomes member and starts to follow, when user becomes a member he/she also follows

request.description: look for groups

create group 

imageName will be located in firebase storage under /groupPictures/. for the details of media processing please refer to PUT /profile/me documentation

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

request.description: Generates a list of groups for user to checkin witt. Preference is given to the groups user already used and then to groups which are active nearby

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

query.description: Time period in days for which rating will be built.

request.description: finds groups' rating based on local activity

item.description:
everythin concerning groups
- create
- edit
- follow/unfollow
- member management
  * ban/unban/follow/member/admin

item.name: feed

request.description:
posts to show when loggedin user profile page was opened

same as GET /feed/user/:loggedInUserKey
shows all posts/checkins/events user with userKey posted/created
news feed for logged in user containing combined feeds for all of the places, groups and users current user is following

stories are quick outlook of content of groups which are present on the feed

this particular one is for news feed. it contains fresh IMAGE and VIDEO posts in the groups which included in user's news feed
contains posts/checkins/events nearby provided location
gives overview of groups active nearby
used to mark story as seen to avoid returning it againg before user sees everything else
feed or particular place page
feed for particular group page
unsorted posts with arbitrary sorting. should not be used actually

item.description:
news and stories feeds to display in various places of an app

each feed contains 2 types of object SLIDER and POST, first contains 10 checkins and in between them there are 10 POSTs

also reposne contains nextPage token which is used to provide paging

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

request.description: get list of users who are going to attend particular event

get list of events current user marked as he is going to attend

the list is sorted by plannedTime being closest to the present time.

pastEvents = false will show future evetns and = true will show past events

- attendance and so on

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.description:
all notifications related things

whenever user is following place/group or user, or being responded to in form of a comment to his post or comment he gets notification through FCM as described in /profile/me/fcmTokens section

and also notification record is created in DB so it can be tracked through the API outlined below

notification is ever created by server reacting to user actions, no direct creation of notifications are supported

notificationTypes are 
- POST there is a new post in group, place or user current user is following, 
- COMMENT - there in a new COMMENT on a post user created or there's a reply to user's comment, 
- CHECK_IN - someone who user following, or from his group, or from his place has checkedin nearby, 
- FOLLOWER - new follower, 
- FOLLOW_REQUEST - user's account is private and someone attempted to follow, 
- MESSAGE - there's new chat message, 
- REPORT_POST - user is admin in a group and someone reported post, 
- REPORT_GROUP - user is superadmin and group was reported, 
- REPORT_USER - user is superadmin and user was reported, 
- REPORT_PLACE - user is superadmin and place was reported

notifications can be listed, marked as seen, and number of unseen could also be queried

item.name: igoauth

request.description: NOT TO BE USED
NOT TO BE USED
NOT TO BE USED

item.description: service calls for instagram related functionality. should not be used directly

request.description:
create new account using email and password

see details in PUT /profile/me documentation

refreshes access token

should be given refreshToken from prveious login/signup request. Result of this method needs to be used as "Authorization: Bearer \<token\>" header to authorize user's requests

Changes user's passwords and invalidates old token and refreshToken

requires user to login again
login using email and password. Should not be used for users originating from social networks' auth

allow to connect instatgram account

returns either connected status or link to open in user's browser allowing user to acknowledge connection

redirect should be followed or alternatively intercepted and opened in background to allow server to finalize IG connection

initiates restore password procedure.

user will receive email from google which will allow him to set a new password
DEPRECATED

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

request.description: DO NOT USE
